name: Permian Scout
description: You survived by moving quietly, reading tracks, and never staying where the big hunters could corner you.

name: Fossil Hunter
description: You came here for bones, not blood, but fieldwork has taught you how to improvise when the wilderness decides to bite back.

name: Marsh Forager
description: You know wet ground, hidden pools, and the things that hatch there. In the marsh, food and death often come from the same nest.
